title: Dark Mode GUI for Pixelmon
description: Dark Mode GUI for the Pixelmon Mod.
body:
# DARK MODE PIXELMON MOD 1.16.5 and 1.20.2


```
Minecraft version: 1.16.5 and 1.20.2
Pixelmon version: 1.16.5 and 1.20.2
(9.2.x has been tested and works fine. However, newer versions could not properly work until this resourcepack is updated)
```



**IT IS HIGHLY RECOMMENDED you play along [Default Dark Mode Resourcepack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode) for a complete Dark Theme experience.**
_Pictures were taken alongside the Default Dark Mode Resourcepack._




### CONSIDERATIONS


This Resourcepack is an update version of: [Dark Theme for Pixelmon Reforged FROM iLisov](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/dark-theme-for-pixelmon-reforged/)
_Thanks to iLisov for his incredible original work, to the Pixelmon Dev Team for creating the unique experience that is mixing Minecraft with Pokémon._




### INSTALLATION GUIDE
Place the zip file in the resourcepack folder of your Minecraft Saves.. Launch Minecraft and go to Options/Resourcepacks and select this resourcepack from the left column.
